issues.detail: The skill only covers happy path examples and does not address error handling or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Stand up a weekly on-call rotation with a tiered escalation policy for the Platform team
scenarios.rationale: Treatment calls /v2/schedules with a weekly rotation, timeRestriction, and ownerTeam, then /v2/escalations with if-not-acked rules at 5/15/30 minutes plus a repeat block, and uses the GenieKey auth header; baseline gestures at the UI or invents endpoints.

scenarios.name: Wire Prometheus Alertmanager into Opsgenie so critical alerts page the right team
scenarios.rationale: Treatment supplies the opsgenie_configs Alertmanager receiver with priority templating tied to severity, responders.team, entity/source, plus a /v2/teams/{team}/routing-rules rule using match-all-conditions on priority=P1 and tags contains production; baseline gives generic webhook config and misses the routing-rules contract.
